content: Laravel Policies (app/Policies) group authorization logic per model; use $this->authorize() in controllers or Gate::allows(). For IDOR prevention, policy methods (e.g. view/update) must compare the authenticated user's id/class/role against the owning record (e.g. attempt.student_id === auth()->id(), or exam assigned to student's class) and return 403 on failure via 'php artisan make:policy'.
